令和3年 = 2021年
Reiwa 3 · Formula: 3 + 2018 = 2021

What Is Reiwa 3 (令和3年)?

Reiwa 3 (令和3年) corresponds to the year 2021 in the Western Gregorian calendar. The Reiwa era began on May 1, 2019, when Emperor Naruhito ascended to the Chrysanthemum Throne. To convert any Reiwa year to the Western calendar, use the formula: Reiwa year + 2018 = Western year. In this case, 3 + 2018 = 2021.

Key Events in 2021 (Reiwa 3)

Reiwa 3 was a landmark year for Japan. The postponed Tokyo 2020 Olympic Games were finally held from July 23 to August 8, 2021, followed by the Paralympic Games in late August. The events were held under strict health protocols, largely without spectators. Japan also continued nationwide vaccination campaigns throughout the year. On Japanese official documents, government forms, and banking records from this period, you will see the year written as 令和3年 rather than 2021, which is why era-to-Western conversion tools are essential for foreign residents and anyone working with Japanese paperwork.

Frequently Asked Questions

What year is Reiwa 3 in Western calendar?

Reiwa 3 (令和3年) is the year 2021 in the Western Gregorian calendar. The conversion formula is simple: add 2018 to the Reiwa year number. So Reiwa 3 + 2018 = 2021. The Reiwa era started on May 1, 2019, under Emperor Naruhito.

What happened in Reiwa 3 (2021)?

Reiwa 3 (2021) was a significant year for Japan, highlighted by the Tokyo 2020 Olympic and Paralympic Games held from July to September. The games were postponed from the previous year and held without spectators in most venues. Japan also advanced its vaccination program throughout this year.

How do I convert Reiwa years to Western years?

To convert any Reiwa year to the Western calendar, simply add 2018 to the Reiwa year number. For example: Reiwa 1 = 2019, Reiwa 3 = 2021, Reiwa 5 = 2023, Reiwa 7 = 2025. Use our free Japanese era converter for instant results with any era including Heisei and Showa.
